steps.title: Substitute the repeated expression
steps.content:
Notice that $(7-8x)$ appears in both the left and right sides of the equation. Rather than expanding everything, use substitution to simplify. Let $u = 7-8x$.

The equation becomes: $$9u + 2 = 8u + 17$$

steps.title: Solve for u and identify the answer
steps.content:
Subtract $8u$ from both sides and subtract 2:
$$9u - 8u = 17 - 2$$
$$u = 15$$

Since $u = 7-8x$, we have $7-8x = 15$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
